name: Hearty Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the brown sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
4. Add the egg; blend well.
5. Beat in the apple and apple juice.
6. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup and level off.
7. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt to the mixture; mix well.
8. Stir in the raisins and nuts.
9. In a shallow bowl, combine the rolled oats, brown sugar, and cinnamon.
10. Add the melted butter; stir until all ingredients are moistened.
11. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of cookie dough about 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
12. Top each cookie with a small amount of topping.
13. Bake for 8-12 minutes or until edges are golden brown.
14. Allow to cool for 1 minute before removing from cookie sheets.
